description: Phase 9 Part 3: Add core data models, service logic, and tests for QuantTube (video upload, channels, watch, engagement), QuantNeon (photo/video posts, stories, follows, explore), QuantSync (feed, posts, communities, trending), QuantEdits (projects, timeline, export), QuantMax (short videos, feed, hashtags), and QuantAds (campaigns, creatives, audiences, analytics). These apps already have some services. Fill in missing core service methods and add tests to meet launch gates.
steps: In apps/quantube/backend/services/video.service.ts: ensure uploadVideo, getVideo, listVideos, updateVideo, deleteVideo, incrementViews, like, comment exist.
In apps/quantube/backend/services/channel.service.ts: ensure createChannel, getChannel, subscribe, unsubscribe, getSubscribers exist.
In apps/quantube/backend/services/history.service.ts: ensure addToHistory, getHistory, clearHistory exist.
In apps/quantneon/backend/services/photo.service.ts: ensure createPost, getPost, listFeed, like, comment, deletePost, explore exist.
In apps/quantneon/backend/services/story.service.ts: ensure createStory, getStories, viewStory, getViewers, expireStories exist.
In apps/quantneon/backend/services/filter.service.ts: ensure listFilters, applyFilter, getFilterPreview exist.
In apps/quantsync/backend/services/post.service.ts: ensure createPost, getPost, listPosts, editPost, deletePost, like, repost, bookmark exist.
In apps/quantsync/backend/services/feed.service.ts: ensure getFeed, getTrending, getBookmarks exist.
In apps/quantsync/backend/services/community.service.ts: ensure createCommunity, getCommunity, joinCommunity, leaveCommunity, listMembers, listCommunities exist.
In apps/quantedits/backend/services/project.service.ts: ensure createProject, getProject, listProjects, updateProject, deleteProject, duplicateProject exist.
In apps/quantedits/backend/services/asset.service.ts: ensure uploadAsset, getAsset, listAssets, deleteAsset exist.
In apps/quantedits/backend/services/export.service.ts: ensure startExport, getExportStatus, listExports, cancelExport exist.
In apps/quantmax/backend/services/profile.service.ts: ensure createProfile, getProfile, updateProfile, follow, unfollow exist.
In apps/quantmax/backend/services/swipe.service.ts or equivalent short-video service: ensure uploadShortVideo, getFeed, like, share, getHashtagFeed exist.
In apps/quantads/backend/services/campaign.service.ts: ensure createCampaign, getCampaign, listCampaigns, updateCampaign, pauseCampaign, resumeCampaign exist.
In apps/quantads/backend/services/analytics.service.ts: ensure getAnalytics, getImpressions, getClicks, getConversions, getCostReport exist.
Add tests for all new/updated services in respective backend/__tests__/ directories.
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint to verify all gates pass
acceptance_criteria: QuantTube video/channel/history services support upload, watch, engagement with tests
QuantNeon post/story/filter services support posting, feed, stories with tests
QuantSync post/feed/community services support full social loop with tests
QuantEdits project/asset/export services support edit workflow with tests
QuantMax profile/short-video services support short video loop with tests
QuantAds campaign/analytics services support campaign lifecycle with tests
